prompt:
Extreme close-up vertical portrait (4:5) of an East Asian woman, playful and intimate in mood. Her face nearly fills the frame, with eyes, nose, and glossy lips as focal points. Both hands form a heart shape in front of her face, fingers close to the lens and softly blurred. Head tilted slightly, one eye winked shut, the other looking gently at the camera, lips puckered in a cute glossy pink kiss. She has sleek black hair with loose strands across her face, natural brows, subtle eyeliner and lashes, soft shimmery eyeshadow, glowing skin, and a small mole beneath one eye. No visible clothing or background due to the tight crop.
Lighting is soft and even, minimal shadows, natural highlights. Straight-on angle, shallow depth of field with sharp focus on eye and lips, foreground hands slightly soft. Realistic skin texture, film-like quality, expressive selfie feel. Avoid plastic-looking skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, harsh shadows, text, or cartoonish rendering.
promptEn:
Extreme close-up vertical portrait (4:5) of an East Asian woman, playful and intimate in mood. Her face nearly fills the frame, with eyes, nose, and glossy lips as focal points. Both hands form a heart shape in front of her face, fingers close to the lens and softly blurred. Head tilted slightly, one eye winked shut, the other looking gently at the camera, lips puckered in a cute glossy pink kiss. She has sleek black hair with loose strands across her face, natural brows, subtle eyeliner and lashes, soft shimmery eyeshadow, glowing skin, and a small mole beneath one eye. No visible clothing or background due to the tight crop.
Lighting is soft and even, minimal shadows, natural highlights. Straight-on angle, shallow depth of field with sharp focus on eye and lips, foreground hands slightly soft. Realistic skin texture, film-like quality, expressive selfie feel. Avoid plastic-looking skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, harsh shadows, text, or cartoonish rendering.
promptZh:
超近距离竖构图肖像 (4:5)，主角为 东亚女性，氛围俏皮而亲密。她的面部几乎填满整个画面，眼睛、鼻子和水润的双唇成为视觉焦点。双手在脸前比出 心形，手指靠近镜头并带有柔和的模糊感。头部微微倾斜，一只眼睛俏皮地闭着，另一只眼睛温柔地注视着镜头，双唇嘟起，涂着可爱的 水光粉色 唇釉。她留着顺滑的黑发，几缕发丝散落在脸上，眉毛自然，眼线和睫毛精致，眼影带有柔和的微光，皮肤透亮，眼下有一颗小痣。由于是紧凑的特写，画面中没有可见的衣物或背景。
光线柔和均匀，阴影极少，带有自然的高光。正面拍摄角度，浅景深，焦点清晰地落在眼睛和嘴唇上，前景的手部略显柔和。皮肤纹理真实，具有胶片质感，充满表现力的自拍感。避免皮肤塑料感、手部畸形、多余手指、生硬阴影、文字或卡通渲染。
